source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/260123 태국 Hollywood, 23G 및 P1 등록서류 - 이창민 팀장님/260310 추가 보완/11. Safety Declaration.docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: H&abyz Co., Ltd. declares no global safety issues for Portable X-ray System model HnX-P1 during 30/01/2025 to 30/01/2026.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Declaration submitted to the Medical Devices Control Division, Thai Food and Drug Administration, Ministry of Public Health.
keyPoints: No reported serious deterioration in the state of health of any person is declared.
No open field safety corrective actions, including recalls, are declared at the point of submission.
False declaration is stated to be an offence under the Medical Device Act (B.E.2551), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562), and other applicable laws.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: I, H&abyz Co., Ltd., the Legal manufacturer and Product Owner

concepts.name: No safety issues globally when used as intended
concepts.evidence: declare that there are no safety issues globally associated with the use of the medical device(s) when used as intended by the Product Owner

concepts.name: Field safety corrective action
concepts.evidence: No open field safety corrective actions (including recalls) at the point of submission of this application.

concepts.name: Serious deterioration in the state of health
concepts.evidence: Serious deterioration in the state of health, in relation to a person means: (a) a life-threatening illness or injury suffered by that person; (b) a permanent impairment of a bodily function of that person; (c) any permanent damage to any part of that person’s body; or (d) a condition requiring medical or surgical intervention to prevent any such permanent impairment or damage.

evidence.claim: The document is a Safety Declaration.
The document is addressed to the Medical Devices Control Division, Thai Food and Drug Administration, Ministry of Public Health.
evidence.evidenceText:
Medical Devices Control Division

Thai Food and Drug Administration

Ministry of Public Health

evidence.claim: H&abyz Co., Ltd. is the Legal manufacturer and Product Owner.
evidence.evidenceText: I, H&abyz Co., Ltd., the Legal manufacturer and Product Owner

evidence.claim: The declaration covers Portable X-ray System model HnX-P1.
evidence.evidenceText:
Product name

Portable X-ray System

Model name

HnX-P1

evidence.claim: The declared safety period is from 30/01/2025 to 30/01/2026.
evidence.evidenceText: in the last one year from 30/01/2025 to 30/01/2026

evidence.claim: The declaration states there are no reported deaths.
The declaration states there is no reported serious deterioration in the state of health of any person.
evidence.evidenceText: No reported serious deterioration in the state of health1 of any person;

evidence.claim: The declaration states there are no open field safety corrective actions, including recalls, at submission.
evidence.evidenceText: No open field safety corrective actions (including recalls) at the point of submission of this application.

evidence.claim: The declaration references the Medical Device Act (B.E.2551) and Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562) for false declarations.
evidence.evidenceText: making a declaration which I know to be false is an offence under the Medical Device Act (B.E.2551), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562) and other applicable laws

evidence.claim: Non-compliance with Thai FDA registration conditions may result in suspension or cancellation of medical device registration.
evidence.evidenceText: any non-compliance with any registration condition issued by the Thai Food and Drug Administration in relation to medical devices registered with the Medical Device Control Division may result in the suspension or cancellation of the medical devices registration.
